org.docgene.model

Interface ExternalLink

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ElementReference, ParagraphElement, StyledElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractAPI, AbstractLink, AbstractWikiLink, XMLArchiveURL, XMLAudio, XMLCitation, XMLDotNetAPI, XMLDoxygenAPI, XMLExternalLink, XMLJavaAPI, XMLMediawikiLink, XMLPythonAPI, XMLQtAPI, XMLVideo, XMLWikipediaLink

    public interface ExternalLink
extends ParagraphElement, ElementReference
    Represent an external link, which can be a bare link or a link to a class in a Java API.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default java.net.URL getNotNullURL()
      Return a not null link URL.
      default java.lang.String getPath()
      Return the link path.
      java.lang.String getText()
      Return the link description text.
      java.net.URL getURL()
      Return the link URL.
      default java.lang.String getURLAsString()
      Return the complete link URL as a String.
      default java.lang.String getURLAsString(java.net.URL baseURL)
      Return the link relative to a base URL.
      default java.lang.String getURLAsString(XMLParentArticle article)
      Return the path of the link relative to its article.
      default boolean isAbsolute()
      Return true if the link is absolute.
      boolean isValid()
      Return true if the link is valid.
      void setValid(boolean isValid)
      Set if the link is valid.

      • setValid

        Set if the link is valid.

        Return a not null link URL.

      • getPath

        default java.lang.String getPath()
        Return the link path. Return null by default.
        Returns:
        the link path

      • isAbsolute

        default boolean isAbsolute()
        Return true if the link is absolute. Retuern true by default.
        Returns:
        true if the link is absolute

      • getURLAsString

        default java.lang.String getURLAsString(java.net.URL baseURL)
        Return the link relative to a base URL.
        Parameters:
        baseURL - the base URL
        Returns:
        the complete link URL as a String

      • getURLAsString

        default java.lang.String getURLAsString(XMLParentArticle article)
        Return the path of the link relative to its article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        Returns:
        the link path

      • getURLAsString

        default java.lang.String getURLAsString()
        Return the complete link URL as a String. Defer by default to getURL() and return the String value of the URL.
        Returns:
        the complete link URL as a String

      • getText

        java.lang.String getText()
        Return the link description text.
        Returns:
        the link description text
